title: 'Atsel #0682
definition:
Azal = "proximity: he has reserved"

 n pr loc
 1) a place near Jerusalem, site presently unknown

 Azel = "reserved"

 n pr m
 2) (CLBL) a Benjamite descendant of Saul and Jonathan
